headline: Which dow jones stocks are moving on Thursday?

headline: Angel Founders Transfer More Than 10 Million Super-Voting Shares to Angel Mission Trust to Preserve Company’s Mission for Generations
summary: PROVO, Utah, July 02, 2026--Angel (NYSE: ANGX) – a media and technology company successfully pioneering a first of its kind audience-driven studio model in which Angel Guild members watch, screen and vote on which films and television series get distributed in theaters and on the Angel platform – today announced that Angel Co-Founders Neal Harmon and Jeffrey Harmon have irrevocably transferred more than 10 million shares of super-voting class B Angel stock to the Angel Mission Trust.
